expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
expectations.evidence: importmap with three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js from jsdelivr CDN found

expectations.text: Scene uses Points or BufferGeometry to render particles
expectations.evidence: THREE.Points with BufferGeometry and BufferAttribute for positions used

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
Right panel has a slider for particle count
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='count' min=100 max=20000 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a slider for particle speed
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='speed' min=0.1 max=5 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a slider for spread/radius
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='spread' min=0.5 max=15 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a color picker input
expectations.evidence: input type='color' id='color-picker' plus 8 color swatches present

expectations.text: Right panel has a Randomize button
expectations.evidence: button id='randomize-btn' with click handler that randomizes all params present

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
